name: RL Agent (NeurofeedbackEnv — synthetic)
note: accuracy_mean = live reward rate (flow-zone target 40–75%). f1_macro_mean = protocol mastery rate across 3 protocols (500 ep each). n_samples = total training episodes.

name: Dream Detector (Sleep-EDF REM detection)
note: 97.20% accuracy is from SYNTHETIC data only (simulated EEG via eeg_simulator.py). No cross-subject evaluation was performed. Real Sleep-EDF cross-subject REM detection accuracy is expected to be 82-88% based on published literature. The 2-channel Sleep-EDF (Fpz-Cz, Pz-Oz) to 4-channel Muse 2 (TP9, AF7, AF8, TP10) domain gap adds further uncertainty.

name: Creativity Detector
note: 99.18% accuracy is an OVERFIT ARTIFACT. Only 850 training samples (~212 per class) — far below the 2000+ minimum needed for reliable generalization. Do not display as 'model accuracy'. Feature-based heuristics are the active live path. Real-world accuracy estimated at ~60% cross-subject.
caveat: Experimental — insufficient training data for reliable generalization.

name: Flow State Detector
note: 62.86% CV accuracy for 4-class detection (no_flow/shallow/moderate/deep). Binary flow/no-flow mode is recommended for higher reliability (~70-75%). Calibration with 30-60 seconds of resting EEG is required. Flow state research uses 30-60 second analysis windows; epochs under 30 seconds have insufficient spectral resolution.
caveat: Marginal 4-class accuracy. Binary mode + calibration recommended.
